text.message: Statistically it is by far the worst option.
It isnt if u know how to play it
no like legit it has been proven to be the worst option
Chatgpt says 4th is best and 1st is worst
I will gladly take 6-9-10 and what ever is last
It vastly depends on the map and even more so, the MMR you're playing at
we're in top 5% of mmr here
like right here. IMO I was hosed no matter what. I either take low production with no ports. or high production and probably have some one just place on my ports
either way this game is a wash and a waste of my time
some guy did 750 games tracked and he's on very high ranking
so you're right but we're talking veeeeeery small differences
here goes the plow to the 8-10
no need for me to finish this one
red you see how this works
you trade me on my turn then I trade you
thats how the economy of this game works
I offered you three fing cards
Lol I don't have to? Do I?
Need to have another look at the rulebook
no but then you end up 4-1 when you could have just traded
thats how a social trading game works
black has ports and doesn't have to trade
you declined everything while black used port and just destroyed us
well blue you traded him the plow
I had to after no one wanted to trade me brick
Well don't point the finger if you assisted black maybe?
But if offered probably 15 different trade Ideas. red didnt want. finally on his 3rd pt
Someone else want to steal from me?
pls dont act like you arent the steal
